specific_question: In Q3 2025, how many virtual multidisciplinary care team members at MediConn Solutions had completed the targeted online training modules for head and neck cancer management?
answer: According to internal data, between July 1 and September 30, 2025, 120 out of 150 targeted care team members had completed the head and neck cancer management online training modules.
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions use its virtual knowledge management platform to deliver targeted continuous training for healthcare professionals in multidisciplinary care teams, addressing knowledge gaps and improving patient care outcomes in head and neck cancer management?
